) AS [t]

        SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[ClusterId], [p0].[ConsultantName], [p0].[ContractSum], [p0].[ContractorName], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p0].[Description], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[LastProgressUpdate], [p0].[LastUpdatedById], [p0].[Latitude], [p0].[Longitude], [p0].[Name], [p0].[ProjectLeadId], [p0].[RadiusInMeters], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status], [p0].[TenderNumber], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[WardId]

    ) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProjectId] = [t0].[Id]

        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t4] ON [t2].[CountyId] = [t4].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[Id] = [t3].[UserId]

    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Wards] AS [w]
    WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[WardId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[ConstituencyId] = [t1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t1].[CountyId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[ClusterId] = [t3].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[AssignedAt], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[ProjectId], [p0].[RevokedAt], [p0].[Role], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [t0].[Id], [t1].[Id], [t2].[Id], [t3].[Id], [u].[Id], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[WardId] = [t1].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [t1].[ConstituencyId] = [t2].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t4] ON [t2].[CountyId] = [t4].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[Id] = [t3].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[FirstName], [t].[Id], [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2]

        SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[ClusterId], [p0].[ConsultantName], [p0].[ContractSum], [p0].[ContractorName], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p0].[Description], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[LastProgressUpdate], [p0].[LastUpdatedById], [p0].[Latitude], [p0].[Longitude], [p0].[Name], [p0].[ProjectLeadId], [p0].[RadiusInMeters], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status], [p0].[TenderNumber], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[WardId]
        FROM [Projects] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProjectId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[WardId] = [t1].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (

        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [t1].[ConstituencyId] = [t2].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (

        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t4] ON [t2].[CountyId] = [t4].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[Id] = [t3].[UserId]

) AS [t4] ON [t].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [t0].[Id], [t1].[Id], [t2].[Id], [t3].[Id], [u].[Id], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

FROM [Projects] AS [p]
WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

END

(@p275, @p276, @p277, @p278, @p279, @p280, @p281, @p282, @p283, @p284, @p285, @p286, @p287, @p288, @p289, @p290, @p291, @p292, @p293, @p294, @p295, @p296, @p297, 3)) AS i ([Id], [ClusterId], [ConsultantName], [ContractSum], [ContractorName], [CreatedAt], [CreatedBy], [CurrentPhysicalProgress], [Description], [EndDate], [IsDeleted], [LastProgressUpdate], [LastUpdatedById], [Latitude], [Longitude], [Name], [ProjectLeadId], [RadiusInMeters], [StartDate], [Status], [TenderNumber], [UpdatedBy], [WardId], _Position) ON 1=0
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT ([Id], [ClusterId], [ConsultantName], [ContractSum], [ContractorName], [CreatedAt], [CreatedBy], [CurrentPhysicalProgress], [Description], [EndDate], [IsDeleted], [LastProgressUpdate], [LastUpdatedById], [Latitude], [Longitude], [Name], [ProjectLeadId], [RadiusInMeters], [StartDate], [Status], [TenderNumber], [UpdatedBy], [WardId])
VALUES (i.[Id], i.[ClusterId], i.[ConsultantName], i.[ContractSum], i.[ContractorName], i.[CreatedAt], i.[CreatedBy], i.[CurrentPhysicalProgress], i.[Description], i.[EndDate], i.[IsDeleted], i.[LastProgressUpdate], i.[LastUpdatedById], i.[Latitude], i.[Longitude], i.[Name], i.[ProjectLeadId], i.[RadiusInMeters], i.[StartDate], i.[Status], i.[TenderNumber], i.[UpdatedBy], i.[WardId])
OUTPUT INSERTED.[UpdatedAt], i._Position;

    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UserName], [u].[BaseLatitude], [u].[BaseLongitude], [u].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    ORDER BY [u].[FirstName]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[AssignedAt], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[RevokedAt], [p].[Role], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [t0].[Id] AS [Id0], [t0].[ClusterId], [t0].[ConsultantName], [t0].[ContractSum], [t0].[ContractorName], [t0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t0].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t0].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [t0].[Description], [t0].[EndDate], [t0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t0].[LastProgressUpdate], [t0].[LastUpdatedById], [t0].[Latitude], [t0].[Longitude], [t0].[Name], [t0].[ProjectLeadId], [t0].[RadiusInMeters], [t0].[StartDate], [t0].[Status], [t0].[TenderNumber], [t0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t0].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t0].[WardId], [t1].[Id] AS [Id1], [t1].[Code], [t1].[ConstituencyId], [t1].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [t1].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy1], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted1], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt1], [t1].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy1], [t2].[Id] AS [Id2], [t2].[Code] AS [Code0], [t2].[CountyId], [t2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy2], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted2], [t2].[Name] AS [Name1], [t2].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt2], [t2].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy2], [t4].[Id] AS [Id3], [t4].[Code] AS [Code1], [t4].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt3], [t4].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy3], [t4].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted3], [t4].[Name] AS [Name2], [t4].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt3], [t4].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy3]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[ClusterId], [p0].[ConsultantName], [p0].[ContractSum], [p0].[ContractorName], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p0].[Description], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[LastProgressUpdate], [p0].[LastUpdatedById], [p0].[Latitude], [p0].[Longitude], [p0].[Name], [p0].[ProjectLeadId], [p0].[RadiusInMeters], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status], [p0].[TenderNumber], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[WardId]
        FROM [Projects] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProjectId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[WardId] = [t1].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [t1].[ConstituencyId] = [t2].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t4] ON [t2].[CountyId] = [t4].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[Id] = [t3].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[FirstName], [t].[Id], [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2]

) AS [t]

    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_0 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]

) AS [t0] ON [t].[WardId] = [t0].[Id]

    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]

    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]

    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]

    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]

    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (

) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]

    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[ClusterId], [p].[ConsultantName], [p].[ContractSum], [p].[ContractorName], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p].[Description], [p].[EndDate], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[LastProgressUpdate], [p].[LastUpdatedById], [p].[Latitude], [p].[Longitude], [p].[Name], [p].[ProjectLeadId], [p].[RadiusInMeters], [p].[StartDate], [p].[Status], [p].[TenderNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[WardId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[Code], [t].[ConstituencyId], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[Name] AS [Name0], [t].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t0].[Id] AS [Id1], [t0].[Code] AS [Code0], [t0].[CountyId], [t0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [t0].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy1], [t0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted1], [t0].[Name] AS [Name1], [t0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt1], [t0].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy1], [t1].[Id] AS [Id2], [t1].[Code] AS [Code1], [t1].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [t1].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy2], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted2], [t1].[Name] AS [Name2], [t1].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt2], [t1].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy2], [t2].[Id] AS [Id3], [t2].[Code] AS [Code2], [t2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt3], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy3], [t2].[DepartmentId], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted3], [t2].[Name] AS [Name3], [t2].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt3], [t2].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy3], [u].[Id] AS [Id4], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt4], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UserName], [u].[BaseLatitude], [u].[BaseLongitude], [u].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId] AND [p0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p0].[RevokedAt] IS NULL))
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[AssignedAt], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[CreatedBy], [p1].[IsDeleted], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[RevokedAt], [p1].[Role], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[UpdatedBy], [p1].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Wards] AS [w]
    WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[WardId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[ConstituencyId] = [t1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

    FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t1].[CountyId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]

    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[ClusterId] = [t3].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[AssignedAt], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[ProjectId], [p0].[RevokedAt], [p0].[Role], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]

    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]

    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]

    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p]

    ) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProjectId] = [t0].[Id]

    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Wards] AS [w]

) AS [t0] ON [t].[WardId] = [t0].[Id]

) AS [t2] ON [t1].[CountyId] = [t2].[Id]

) AS [t0] ON [t].[WardId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[ConstituencyId] = [t1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t1].[CountyId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[ClusterId] = [t3].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[AssignedAt], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[ProjectId], [p0].[RevokedAt], [p0].[Role], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [t0].[Id], [t1].[Id], [t2].[Id], [t3].[Id], [u].[Id], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

FROM [Projects] AS [p]
WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
